passives.name: Manaflow
passives.effects: Grants a charge every 8 seconds, up to 4 charges. Consumes a charge [[on-hit]] and whenever affecting an enemy or ally with an [[champion ability|ability]] to grant {{as|3 '''bonus''' mana}}, increased to {{as|6|mana}} for champion targets, up to a '''maximum''' of {{as|360 '''bonus''' mana}}.

effects_structured.raw: Gain bonus health equal to 15% of bonus mana.
Gain a Manaflow charge every 8s, up to 4 charges.
On-hit or on ability affect, consume a charge to gain 3 bonus mana (6 vs champions), up to 360 bonus mana.
Transforms into Fimbulwinter when bonus mana reaches 360.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Shop sell value was corrected to Tier-1 canonical dataset/page values during Tear-line sibling review.

Verified Winter's Approach Manaflow semantics against page-level source: charges are consumed on hit or ability-affect events, with champion-target bonus-mana branch and 360 bonus-mana transform threshold.
